name: Murphy Oil Corporation
description: Murphy Oil Corporation is an independent energy company engaged in the exploration and production of crude oil, natural gas, and natural gas liquids. Headquartered in Houston, Texas, the company maintains a global presence with operations primarily focused in the United States and Canada, including significant activities in the Gulf of Mexico. With a history dating back to 1907, Murphy Oil is committed to innovative exploration strategies and sustainable, efficient operations, aiming to provide energy that empowers people while maintaining a focus on environmental protection and community engagement.
